articles.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Steals and reaches from Day 2 - PFF

articles.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman "deeply sorry" for failing to alert law enforcement to Canada school shooter's ChatGPT account - CBS News
articles.description: The ChatGPT account of the shooter, who killed eight people in a small British Columbia community, had been banned about eight months prior to the massacre.

articles.title: Justice Department to allow firing squads for executions in move to ramp up capital punishment - NPR
articles.description: The Justice Department will adopt firing squad as a permitted method of execution as the Trump administration moves to ramp up and expedite capital punishment cases.

articles.title: Maine Gov. Janet Mills vetoes ban on data center construction - NBC News

articles.title: Microsoft will let you pause Windows Updates indefinitely, 35 days at a time - The Verge
articles.description: Microsoft is rolling out changes to Windows Update that will let users pause updates for 35 days at a time and repeat the pause as many times as they want.

articles.title: Nvidia Breakout Sends Chip Giant to First Record Since October - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Nvidia Corp. shares rose to their first record in months on Friday, the latest example of improving momentum at the leader in artificial intelligence chips.
